# RAPath South Korea

> South Korea MFDS Medical Device Regulatory Reference

Plain English reference for South Korea MFDS medical device regulation — approval pathways, classification, and post-market obligations.

RAPath is an independent open-source project providing plain English navigation aids for medical device regulatory requirements. Content is written with AI assistance and derived from publicly available official sources only. Always verify against official regulatory sources before making any regulatory decisions. Not legal or regulatory advice.

## Sections

- [Start Here](https://rapath.org/kr/start-here/what-is-a-medical-device)
- [Pre-Market](https://rapath.org/kr/pre-market/classification)
- [Post-Market](https://rapath.org/kr/post-market/overview)
- [Legislation](https://rapath.org/kr/legislation/medical-devices-act)
- [What's New](https://rapath.org/kr/whats-new/regulatory-changes)

## Official Sources

- [MFDS (Ministry of Food and Drug Safety)](https://www.mfds.go.kr/eng/)
- [NIFDS (National Institute of Food and Drug Safety Evaluation)](https://www.nifds.go.kr/eng/)
- [Medical Device Information System (UDIKOREA)](https://udikorea.mfds.go.kr/)
- [Korean Medical Device Act](https://www.law.go.kr/LSW/eng/engLsSc.do?menuId=2)

- [All Jurisdictions](https://rapath.org/#jurisdictions)
